# Tabserve

> Tabserve builds simple, focused mobile apps and the practical guides around them: OneBag (travel packing), Routevia (Türkiye trip planning), and RentFlow (rental management for landlords).

## Apps
- [OneBag](https://coinsayfasi.github.io/onebag/): Smart carry-on packing lists by destination with a live bag-weight tracker for 80+ airlines.
- [Routevia](https://coinsayfasi.github.io/routevia-app/): Discover places to visit across Türkiye and plan AI-powered, day-by-day trip routes.
- [RentFlow](https://coinsayfasi.github.io/rentflow/): Rental property manager for landlords with free rental yield and cash-flow calculators.

## Guides
- [Blog](https://apps.tabserve.com.tr/blog/): Practical guides on packing smart, exploring Türkiye, and managing rental property.
- [Türkiye Travel Guides](https://gezi.tabserve.com.tr/): City-by-city travel guides for Turkey.

## About
- [About Tabserve](https://apps.tabserve.com.tr/about.html)
